ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (active, inactive) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  "last_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_due" TEXT /* Date the next inspection is due */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person responsible for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "distance_away" REAL /* Distance from the monitoring equipment (in meters) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "overheated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the equipment was overheated (yes/no) */,
  "avg_ambient_temp" REAL /* Average ambient temperature during the recording period (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded (in percentage) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded (in hPa) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded (in m/s) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall recorded (in mm) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the maintenance */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., overheating, maintenance required) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Remote Sensor, Local Station) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_calibration" TEXT /* Date the source was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type collected (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum valid value for the data type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum valid value for the data type */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_result" TEXT /* Result of the assessment (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the quality assessment */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the data quality (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, published, archived) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
